name: Bug report

labels: bug

## What happened

A clear description of the unexpected behavior.

## What you expected

What you thought should happen instead.

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Environment

- OS: <!-- macOS 14.x / Windows 11 / Ubuntu 24.04 / etc. -->
- Shell: <!-- bash 5.x / PowerShell 5.1 / 7.x / zsh -->
- Browser (if it's a shell or timelapse issue): <!-- Chrome 130 / Firefox 128 / Safari 17 -->
- zergling version: <!-- check SKILL.md frontmatter -->

## Logs / screenshots

If it's a CI failure: paste the failing step. If it's a browser issue: paste the console output. If it's an install issue: paste the script output.
